body:
# Always Rain

![Always Rain cover image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Sekai0NI0itamio/always-rain/main/.modcompiler-art/description-image.webp)

Always Rain is a simple mod that makes it rain all the time in a Minecraft world. It also keeps thunderstorms on if you want them, and the weather setting can be changed while the game is running.

### How It Works (for the user)
- The rain never stops unless you change the config.
- Thunder can stay on continuously if you set the config to “thunderstorm”.
- You can edit the config file while the game is running; the changes take effect immediately.
- No new items, blocks, mobs, or commands are added.

### Features
- Full‑time rain across the world.
- Optional constant thunder when the config is set to thunderstorm.
- Config file hot‑reloads without restarting the game.
- Works on any Forge server that loads the mod.
- No extra inventory or UI changes.

### Why Use This Mod?
- Keeps your builds wet without manually using commands.
- Great for adventure maps or builds that need constant rain.
- Easy to toggle thunderstorms on or off via a tiny text file.
- Light‑weight and does not interfere with other mods.

## What You'll Notice

- Rain stays on all the time.
- Thunder can stay on if the config is set to thunderstorm.
description: Hate that rain stops after a while? This mod keeps it raining all the time, and you can even keep thunder on if you want.
title: Always Rain
